title: AZ-104: Monitor and back up Azure resources
summary: AZ-104: Monitor and back up Azure resources

sections.title: AZ-104: Monitor and back up Azure resources
sections.summary: AZ-104: Monitor and back up Azure resources

lessons.title: Introduction to Azure Backup
lessons.content_md:
Evaluate whether Azure Backup is appropriate to use for your backup needs and describe how the features of Azure Backup work to provide backup solutions for your needs.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/intro-to-azure-backup/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

lessons.title: Protect your virtual machines by using Azure Backup
lessons.content_md:
Use Azure Backup to help protect on-premises servers, virtual machines, SQL Server, Azure file shares, and other workloads.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/protect-virtual-machines-with-azure-backup/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Protect your virtual machines by using Azure Backup

lessons.title: Monitor your Azure virtual machines with Azure Monitor
lessons.content_md:
Learn how to monitor your Azure VMs by using Azure Monitor to collect and analyze VM host and client metrics and logs.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/monitor-azure-vm-using-diagnostic-data/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Monitor your Azure virtual machines with Azure Monitor

labs.title: Laboratorio opcional: aplica AZ-104: Monitor and back up Azure resources
labs.instructions_md: Lleva a la practica lo aprendido en **AZ-104: Monitor and back up Azure resources**. Implementa un escenario pequeno y documenta tu solucion. Este laboratorio es opcional pero refuerza la retencion.

rubric.description: La solucion cumple el objetivo del laboratorio.
La explicacion es comprensible y ordenada.
